deselect_reason: byte-equality test requires the archived v2.0.0 build environment; hosted CI deselects exactly this node id (policy D-V3-04)
note: Measured from a CLEAN CLONE of the tagged commit -- which is what the published test-report asset contains and what a third party reproducing from the source archive will see. A full working copy reports 2166 because five tests require optional content that is untracked: the prompt packs (3 tests), the eye corpus (1) and the reference PDFs (1). Each of those skips says 'expected on CI'. Documenting the working-copy figure would have reproduced defect V4X-D-004: release notes claiming one number while the test-report asset built from the same commit says another.
